# Post Build Results Action

A composite GitHub Action that posts centralized build results as comments to pull requests in source repositories.

## Features

- ✅ **Comprehensive Status Reporting**: Reports library, application, and test build statuses
- 📊 **Build Metrics**: Includes build duration and performance data
- 🔗 **Deep Links**: Links to build logs, artifacts, and performance metrics
- 🎨 **Rich Formatting**: Uses emojis and tables for clear status visualization
- 🛡️ **Error Handling**: Graceful failure handling that doesn't break workflows

## Usage

```yaml
- name: Post build results to source PR
  if: always() && github.event_name == 'repository_dispatch' && needs.build.outputs.pr-number != ''
  uses: ./.github/actions/post-build-results
  with:
    github-token: ${{ secrets.PAT_TOKEN }}
    source-repo: ${{ needs.build.outputs.source-repo }}
    pr-number: ${{ needs.build.outputs.pr-number }}
    build-type: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-type }}
    save-logs: ${{ needs.build.outputs.save-logs }}
    build-status: ${{ needs.build.result }}
    library-status: ${{ needs.build.outputs.library-status }}
    application-status: ${{ needs.build.outputs.application-status }}
    tests-status: ${{ needs.build.outputs.tests-status }}
    build-start-time: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build-start-time }}
    artifacts-retention: '5'
```

## Inputs

| Input | Description | Required | Default |
|-------|-------------|----------|---------|
| `github-token` | GitHub token with permissions to comment on PRs | Yes | |
| `source-repo` | Source repository in format owner/repo | Yes | |
| `pr-number` | Pull request number in source repository | Yes | |
| `build-type` | Build type (release/debug) | Yes | |
| `save-logs` | Whether logs were saved as artifacts | Yes | |
| `build-status` | Overall build job status | Yes | |
| `library-status` | Library build step outcome | Yes | |
| `application-status` | Application build step outcome | Yes | |
| `tests-status` | Tests step outcome | Yes | |
| `build-start-time` | Build start timestamp (Unix seconds) | Yes | |
| `artifacts-retention` | Artifacts retention period in days | Yes | |
| `run-id` | GitHub Actions run ID | No | `${{ github.run_id }}` |
| `run-number` | GitHub Actions run number | No | `${{ github.run_number }}` |

## Outputs

| Output | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `comment-posted` | Whether the comment was successfully posted (true/false) |
| `comment-url` | URL of the posted comment (if successful) |

## Example Output

The action generates rich PR comments like this:

```markdown
## ✅ Centralized Build Success

**Build Configuration:**
- **Type:** `release`
- **Save Logs:** `true`
- **Duration:** `180s (3 min)`
- **Run:** [#42](https://github.com/Demo-CI/build/actions/runs/12345)

**Build Steps:**
- **Static Library:** ✅ Success
- **Application:** ✅ Success
- **Tests:** ✅ Success

**Summary:**
Build completed successfully!

**Artifacts:**
- 📦 Build artifacts available for 5 days
- 📝 Detailed build logs saved (including timing metrics)

**Actions:**
- [View detailed build logs](https://github.com/Demo-CI/build/actions/runs/12345)
- [Download artifacts](https://github.com/Demo-CI/build/actions/runs/12345)
- [Performance metrics](https://github.com/Demo-CI/build/actions/runs/12345) included in job summary

---
*This comment was automatically generated by the centralized build system.*
```
